arts.ttl: AC Milan hoping to capitalise on unsettled Newcastle star’s situation in January
arts.sum: AC Milan are aware of how unsettled Kieran Trippier has become at Newcastle United and want to capitalise on the situation in the January transfer window. The 34-year-old right-back recently lost the Magpies’ captaincy with Eddie Howe opting to hand the armband to Bruno Guimaraes. And to make matters worse, has also been demoted to […] The post AC Milan hoping to capitalise on unsettled Newcastle star’s situation in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Transfer Talk: AC Milan eye USMNT star Johnny Cardoso
arts.sum: - Chelsea have added Bayer Leverkusen's Victor Boniface to the list of options being considered as they aim to sign a striker in the summer, claims TEAMtalk . - Werder Bremen are hoping to force Naby Keïta out of the club in January, reports Sport Bild, after the midfielder's proposed summer move to Hatayspor fell through at the last minute because the 29-year-old decided that he didn't want to go to Turkey.
